# Pull Request

## Description
Provide a brief summary of your changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (change that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
List the specific changes made:
- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing
Describe how you tested your changes:
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines

## Testing Checklist
- [ ] I have tested this locally
- [ ] I have run the test suite: `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] I have run linting: `black . && flake8 . && pylint **/*.py`
- [ ] I have run security checks: `bandit -r . && safety check`
- [ ] All new features have corresponding tests

## Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] I have added docstrings to new functions
- [ ] I have updated API documentation if applicable
- [ ] I have added/updated type hints

## Security
- [ ] I have not introduced any hardcoded secrets
- [ ] I have not exposed sensitive information
- [ ] I have validated all user inputs
- [ ] I have followed security best practices

## Screenshots/Examples (if applicable)
Add any screenshots or code examples that demonstrate your changes.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the pull request here.

## Breaking Changes
Does this PR introduce any breaking changes? If so, describe them:

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Reviewer Notes
Any notes for the reviewer or additional information they should know.
